name: opening station description berth alias merges

source.purpose: Regression for setup duplication where Author owns a broad station row but its description already anchors the specific berth later re-created by Narrator/Archivist.

loc_opening.name: Sable Notch Station - a mid-corridor fueling stop where three beacon routes intersect and two of them are currently dark.
loc_opening.description: The PC's ship sits in berth seven with an impound-pending flag on the registry terminal; the fuel account is frozen until the lien resolves.
atmosphericConditions: Low-cycle lighting, recycled air carrying fuel residue, half the berth indicators blinking amber.

established: The ship is already at berth seven on Sable Notch Station.

narrator.prose: The amber impound flag on berth seven keeps blinking while Voss Idara waits outside the gate.

mechanicalEffects.name: Berth Seven, Sable Notch Station
mechanicalEffects.description: A fueling bay on low-cycle lighting. Your ship occupies berth seven with an amber impound-pending flag. Voss Idara stands a few paces outside the gate.

established: The ship occupies berth seven with an amber impound-pending flag.
Voss Idara stands outside the gate.
